name: Thermal Analysis Workflow
description: Example pipeline for conjugate heat transfer (CHT) post-processing. Demonstrates temperature field visualization with gradient computation for heat flux analysis.

steps.name: Step 1: Inspect data
steps.notes: First, explore what fields and timesteps are available.

steps.name: Step 2: Temperature overview
steps.notes: Cinematic rendering of temperature field with auto-framing.

steps.name: Step 3: Temperature cross-section
steps.notes: Horizontal slice through the heatsink showing internal temperature gradient.

steps.name: Step 4: Temperature profile along wall
steps.notes: Extract temperature profile along the heated wall for validation against analytical solution.

steps.name: Step 5: Heat flux via gradient
steps.notes: Compute temperature gradient magnitude as a proxy for heat flux (q = -k * gradT).

steps.name: Step 6: Statistics summary
steps.notes: Extract min/max/mean/std of temperature and velocity fields.

steps.name: Step 7: Surface heat flux integration
steps.notes: Integrate temperature over the heated wall to compute average wall temperature.

steps.name: Step 8: Time evolution animation
steps.notes: Animate temperature evolution from cold start to steady state at 5x speed.
